# API Reference

Technical reference for the `cfd_io` package. 

## Package Architecture

See the [Architecture](architecture.md) page for a visual overview of how modules relate.

## Modules

*Autogenerated from source docstrings.*

- [read_file](read.md): read any supported format — dispatches by file extension ([Supported Formats](../formats.md))
- [write_file](write.md): write any supported format — dispatches by file extension ([Supported Formats](../formats.md))
- [do_convert](convert.md): read one format, write another in a single call
- [get_info / FileInfo](info.md): inspect file metadata without loading data
- [Readers](readers.md): format-specific reader functions
- [Writers](writers.md): format-specific writer functions
